name: hoc/error-page
description: A pre-styled error-state page HOC that displays HTTP status codes (404, 500, 403, etc.) with an illustration, a descriptive message, and a primary action button to navigate home or retry. Provides ErrorPage, ErrorPageIcon, ErrorPageTitle, ErrorPageDescription, and ErrorPageAction primitives with responsive centering and theme-aware muted colors. Ideal for catch-all route fallbacks and global error boundaries.
useCases: 404 Not Found fallback routes when a user navigates to an invalid or deleted resource URL
500 Internal Server Error pages triggered by global error boundaries after an uncaught exception
403 Unauthorized screens for role-restricted pages with a button to request access or contact support
503 Maintenance mode pages displaying a countdown timer and a retry-action button
usage: import { ErrorPage, ErrorPageIcon, ErrorPageTitle, ErrorPageDescription, ErrorPageAction } from "shadcn-solid-components/hoc/error-page"
